title: Fresh Vanilla Plus
description: Fresh Vanilla Plus improves vanilla Minecraft with cleaner textures, enhanced visuals, and a lightweight, low-end friendly design.
body:
**A simple, lightweight Vanilla+ resource pack that brings vibrant biomes, a realistic sun and moon, and cleaner textures with minimal FPS impact!**

# ✨ Core Features #

- ​**🌍 Vibrant Biomes:** Custom colormaps for grass and foliage that make the world look brighter and livelier.

 - **🌒 Realistic Sun & Moon:** Replaced the default square celestial bodies with realistic, round HD versions.
​
- **🌳 Better Environment:** HD 64x blocks, 3D-looking rails, and dense bushy leaves.

- ​**🎃 Clean Pumpkin View:** Removed the annoying pumpkin blur so you can see clearly while wearing it.

- **​🔤 Clean UI Font:** Replaces the default text with a smoother, modern font for an easier-to-read interface.

- ​**🌙 Tweaked GUI:** Slight, simple adjustments to the default menus for a fresher look.
​
## **⚙️ Compatibility & Requirements** 

- **​Performance:** optimized! Designed to have almost zero impact on your FPS.
​
- **Mods Required:** Best experienced with **Fabric API** and **Sodium.** This combo ensures the custom UI font and other visual tweaks render perfectly. (OptiFine is not required and has not been tested).
